name: Lamb with Spinach (Saag-gosht)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the sliced onions in the oil in a flameproof casserole until lightly browned. Then add the ginger, garlic, salt and meat and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 to 3 minutes.
2. Add the water, bring to a boil and cook for 30 to 40 minutes or until the meat is tender.
3. Stir in the spinach and continue to cook, covered, for 10 minutes. Reduce the heat and mix in the chopped coriander, dill yoghurt, and chillies.
4. Leave covered over a low heat for 10 minutes. If the dish is not dry enough, cook uncovered until it becomes a thick sauce. Serve hot with rice or naan.
